TypePayment.description: Manual payment method only — one of `ExternalBank`, `ExternalCash`, `ExternalCheck`, `ExternalOther`. Automated methods (`Card`, `DirectDebit`) are managed through the payment gateway.

IsGreyListed.description: When `true`, prevents the customer from accessing payment forms

NoteInvoice.description: Note appended to the bottom of all upcoming invoices

example.NoteInvoice: PO.123456 - Thank you for your trust.
